response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, comfortably exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and current AI-agent/MCP tooling work at re:cinq. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang), MongoDB/SQL exposure, Docker/Kubernetes, and a track record of TDD and craftsmanship practices align well with the role. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or React-at-scale signal in recent roles and no PostgreSQL mention, but the breadth and current AI-agent infrastructure work strongly offset these.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep full-stack polyglot background with TypeScript, Node.js, Java, and more
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
React exposure is light and not recent-stack-central
PostgreSQL not listed; database experience leans MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited recent React
